description: Model proposal flags nested posts under /users and recommends flat collections.
notes: Seeded code samples a structure where /users/$uid/posts grows unbounded. Reading /users/$uid downloads every post. Skill playbook anti-pattern: deep nesting and unbounded lists under entities. Proposal must name the flattening fix or denormalization.
prompt: Look at the data structure here and propose a better model. I keep downloading way too much data when I read a user.
